news.t: Columbia Threadneedle Investments Launches Six New ETFs Across Equity and Fixed Income

holdings.infoBox: REFA is an equity ETF with a total of 214 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 4.13%, BHP Group at 3.27%, Roche Holding AG at 3.04%, Novartis AG at 2.88%, and Tokyo Electron at 2.41%.

overview.description: The Columbia Research Enhanced International Equity ETF (REFA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of large- and mid-cap companies in developed international markets outside North America. Stock selection is based on proprietary ratings. REFA was launched on Dec 11, 2025 and is issued by Columbia Threadneedle.
infoTable: Beta Advantage Research Enhanced International Equity Index

data.title: Columbia Threadneedle Investments Launches Six New ETFs Across Equity and Fixed Income
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Columbia Threadneedle Investments today announced the launch of six new exchange-traded funds (ETFs), further expanding its differentiated range of actively managed and Resear...
